name: 18.25 fl oz PolyPro Short Tumbler Transparent Blue - Room Essentials™
description:
This PolyPro Transparent Short Tumbler from Room Essentials™ is a versatile addition to your drinkware. Made with 20% post-consumer recycled plastic, this BPA-free tumbler is designed in blue for a vibrant pop of color. It has a capacity of 18.25 fluid ounces, making it ideal for serving a variety of hot and cold beverages, and it's both dishwasher safe and microwave safe for reheating.

Room Essentials™: Everyday Value
